feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: will incomplete TECO of a production order impact MRP ??
entry.content: I have a situation where i have list of production orders where TECO is not completed when MRP runs its picks up the demand and shows in correct call-off - can some one help to understand this issue. in my view if the Teco is not completed the demand should be reflecting for all the parts in that production order

entry.title: Campaigns on Servicenow
entry.content:
Dear Members

Can we count the number of clicks on specific links through service now campaigns?

entry.title: Is there any filter for Q&A community by SAP products?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Now the new community has been launched, but the questions in Q&A can't be easily identified by different SAP products, for example: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, etc., so it brings efforts to determine which product the questions are coming from, since I am only focusing on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and other colleagues may focus on ECC, S/4HANA OP.

So it is better to add a mandatory field when posting a question to identity the specific SAP products. it can be identity which product belongs to from the default page. see screenshot below

 

Br, Bob

entry.title: Confirm MTE specifications
entry.content:
I have some questions regarding MTE S/4Hana Public Cloud.

  1. Regarding MTE, I understand that even though the accounting period is closed, it is possible to cancel service confirmations. (We have confirmed that cancellation integration is possible from Salesforce.) Is this in accordance with MTE specifications?

  2. If we cancel service confirmations from Salesforce for the two months prior to the closed accounting period, will it be deducted for the current month or the two months prior?

In STE, it was specified that cancellations of service confirmations for the month when the accounting period is closed cannot be done. Therefore, I would like to confirm the specifications on the MTE side again.

Thank you and best regards,
Kishida

entry.title: 9H Paymnet budget and 9I Commi budget Mismatch
entry.content:
We are facing the weird view in fund management after S4 HANA Migration. Our 9H payment budget consumed more than commitment budget 9I . When we checked the report and table, we find below 4 document which is triggered 9H budget only. All 4 document is 2024 year. Please find the attachment for details. 

9H (12,138,544.29) - 9I (9,906,602.82)  = Varieance 

Regards

Sarvottam Tomar

entry.title: Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in material master
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in the material master Sales: General/Plant & Basic Data 1 tab.
Usually, It appears below the Base Unit of Measure in Sales: General/Plant.

Can anyone explain? what could be the reason for it?

entry.title: Controle de cópia fatura - ordem de venda
entry.content:
Boa tarde!
Estou criando uma ordem de venda de complemento de valor com referência a uma fatura de venda.

A minha fatura possui código de imposto M2, que está cadastrado na J1BTAX com Direito Fiscal ICMS IC0, porém possui uma exceção fiscal quando o emissor e receptor são do MT, trazendo Dir.Fisc. ICMS RBI.

Ao criar uma ordem de venda referenciando a fatura de venda, a expectativa é que o Direito Fiscal apresentasse as informações da fatura. Porém os dados estão sendo validados na J1BTAX de acordo com a categoria de item e código de imposto cadastrado.

Gostaria de saber se há alguma possibiliade de puxar as informações do cód.imposto e direito fiscal no controle de cópia da VTAF. Ou se a solução seria somente criando uma nova categoria de item com o cód de imposto de já tem a exceção fiscal?

entry.title: I am executing Rebate Settlement , Credit memo generated with negative value. Change in Rebate %
entry.content:
I am executing Rebate Settlement in s4/Hana, Credit memo generated with negative value.

Reason is the Change in Rebate contract percentage previously its 12% and now it 11%. 

Need to settle credit memo in positive.

entry.title: what is Data Management and Landscape Transformation (DMLT) service from SAP
entry.content:
Hi friends,

does anyone help me to understand what is the Data Management and Landscape Transformation (DMLT) service from SAP? is it a paid service?

I have gone through the SAP note 39919 - Implementation of parallel currencies in FI

it has the below details.

Does anyone have availed this service? what is the procedure to it and do we have to pay for it?

 

Thanks in advance.

SAP Community #DataManagementandLandscapeTransformation

entry.title: Source List Fixed Vendor report plus Purchase Info Record data
entry.content: Is there a standard report in SAP (not S4 Hana) that contains the fixed vendor and the purchase info record price data for the fixed vendor?

entry.title: Erro FIEBPP-112 intergração de retorno bacario FF.5
entry.content:
Olá, pesso apoio da comunidade para que eu possa encontar uma solução do erro FIEBPP-112
Esta mensagem esta configurada como alto explicativa, porem não é possivel identificar o motivo do erro.

Ao executar a integração de um arquivo de retorno bancario atravez da FF.5, ao processar um documento que consta como codigo de retono definido como "DV - Pagamento não confirmado" o sistema deve efetuar o estorno de forma automatica, porem estou recebendo uma mensagem de erro.

Verificando durante o debug notei que existe um comentario ao lado que indica que foi implementada um Sap Note, mas pesquisando por esse numero não localizei qualquer documentação ou menção a estas notas. 

Verifiquei na SNOTE em meu sistema e não localizei estas notas instaladas.

Verifiquei que na tabela BSEGC não possue dados.

Alguem poderia dar uma direção de como identificar uma forma de corrigir este caso.
#ECC

entry.title: transport receipts time series planning IBP
entry.content: • I have a scenario in IBP time series planning where transport  receipts are generating in excess of safety days  planned. What could be the cause for this? Projected ending inventory keeps building inventory more than what is needed.

entry.title: Best practice - SAP Public Cloud - settings for Information Lifecycle Management (1KA) Settings
entry.content:
I am currently working on a project that involves configuring the settings for Information Lifecycle Management (1KA). Given the critical nature of these settings, I wanted to reach out to see if you or anyone in your network has any experience or detailed insights with this specific scope item.

As the SAP Standard settings are empty I'm searching for best practices for the SAP FI objects in SAP Public Cloud. 

I wanted to ask if we have any best practice settings or configuration in the area of finance objects a previous customer project that could serve as a reference. This would be extremely helpful and save valuable time. Any advice, best practices, or resources you could share regarding Information Lifecycle Management (1KA) would be immensely helpful and greatly appreciated!!

entry.title: Dropdown filtering in SAC
entry.content:
SAP Managed Tags: SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer

Hi community

I am new to SAC.

I want to introduce a dropdown filtering menu in my story. I succeded in populating the dropdown using these lines of code in the onInitialization() function : 


var Inspectors_list = Table_1.getDataSource().getMembers("Don_ordre.Inspecteur");

if (Inspectors_list.length > 0) 
{
for (var i=0;i<Inspectors_list.length; i++){
Dropdown_1.addItem(Inspectors_list[i].id,Inspectors_list[i].description);
}}
 
Then i proceeded to to adding the following lines of code in the Dropdown_1 - onSelect() :

var x = Dropdown_1.getSelectedKey();
console.log(x);
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Don_ordre.Inspecteur",x);


The filter is not working correctly and i do not understand why.
There is only two values in the dropdown once selected returns values , all the others returns zero.

Also i figured if it's an issue with my model , why would two values from the dropdown filter correctly and the others won't.

 

 

Also some screenshots from the modeler

entry.title: adjust production order qty to reflect delivery tolerance
entry.content:
Hi MRP Experts,

We are operating in an MTO environment, where our customers requesting us always to ship the full order qty with a tolerance of -0%/+10%. Unfortunatly MRP is triggering the nominal production order qty to the nominal sales order qty and component scrap of the BOM is in 30% of the cases not sufficient to achieve nominal sales order qty.

I do not wnat to add mor scrap to the BOM but would rather prefer to set the nominal production order qty on the upper end of the sales order tolerance to ensure I maximize sales and do not bother the customer with shorts.

What is the best way to achieve such?

Thx

Matt

entry.title: SavedValues in hybris
entry.content:
Lets Say your Model is: TraineeUser

Provide PK of instance for which data is needed.

 

fss = spring.getBean("flexibleSearchService") ;
modelService = spring.getBean("modelService")
queryString =select {sv.pk} from {SavedValues as sv join TraineeUser as t on {t.pk}={sv.modifiedItem} } where {sv.modifiedItem} = '87871234564'

SavedValuesModel savedValueModel=fss.search(queryString).result[0];
TraineeUserModel target=(TraineeUserModel) savedValueModel.getModifiedItem();

println("User: "+savedValueModel.getUser().getUid())
println("store: "+target.getStore().getName())
println("Email: "+target.getEmail())
println("Time: "+target.getCreationtime())

 

@Hybris @SAPcommerce

entry.title: BPEM created successfully but assign to the wrong group. Change the config, but not showing in BDEX
entry.content:
Hello All,

Need your help: -

The BPEM was successfully created but assigned to the incorrect group. We have updated the configuration, but it is not reflecting in BDEX (/BTI/BWC). Additionally, when we simulate with all parameters, all agents are displayed correctly.

Kind Regards,

Subhas

entry.title: My Object Page V4 is empty , except Header. Even i can't see the edit and delete options too.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have developed a RAP Application in my project , a Table zbumamapping should be exposed as a List view with object page. Every thing is fine . But when i am clicking on any entry on the screen , the object page doesn't have any fields. It is empty. The service i used is V4. I can see only the header in the object page. 

Below is the screen shot of the app i created. 

When i click on an item , the next object page is empty ( except company code as header ) , also there are no edit and delete options on screen.

I have maintained the below metadata extensions.

 

@Metadata.layer: #CORE

 

@UI : { headerInfo:{

typeName: 'Mapping Table',

typeNamePlural: 'Mapping Table',

title: {

type: #STANDARD,

label: 'Mapping Table',

value: 'Companycode'

},

description.value: 'Companycode' }

}

 

 

 

@Search.searchable: true

annotate view ZC_BIMAMAPPING

with

{

 

@UI.facet: [{ id: 'Mapping Data',

purpose: #STANDARD,

type: #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,

label: 'Mapping Data',

//targetQualifier: 'HeaderItems',

position: 10 } ]

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 10 }],

identification: [{ position: 10 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 10 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Company Code'

Companycode;

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 20 }],

identification: [{ position: 20 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 20 }]}

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Mapping Type'

Maptype;

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 30 }],

identification: [{ position: 30 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 30 }] }

// identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Source Value'

Sourcevalue;

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 40 }],

identification: [{ position: 40 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}]}

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Target Value'

Targetvalue;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 50 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created By'

created_by;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 60 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created At'

created_at;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 70 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed By'

last_changed_by;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 80 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed At'

last_changed_at;

 

//@UI.hidden: true

//ExcelRowNumber;

 

}

.

 

 Even though i cant able to view the complete object page and edit it. Please let me know whether i need to implement any code ? Mine is a Managed scenario.

Is there something we need to do in the BAS side too to enable the object view?

@Andre_Fischer  I saw you helping many in RAP Abap applications. Can you help me too. 

BR,

Vamsi Krishna Busi,

8867784916.

entry.title: how to show two currency in one PO
entry.content: My client's base ccy is INR, the purchase is done in EUR to which a freight charge was included in USD, the client is asking to include that USD in the PO, but as per SAP we can only display only header ccy. Can anyone suggest the correct procedure to tackle this problem if it is actually possible.

entry.title: How to pass Multiple Values to POST json
entry.content:
Hello,

How to pass multiple values for a particular field to OData POST request
